diagrams.title: Distributed System Architecture Overview
diagrams.description: Shows the layered architecture of a distributed system with clients, network, middleware, and servers
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how components interact in distributed systems

diagrams.title: Client-Server Model
diagrams.description: Illustrates the client-server communication model where clients make requests and servers respond
diagrams.purpose: Understanding request-response pattern in distributed computing

diagrams.title: Peer-to-Peer Network Structure
diagrams.description: Shows mesh network where all nodes are equal and can communicate directly
diagrams.purpose: Understanding decentralized architecture without central server

diagrams.title: Clock Synchronization using NTP
diagrams.description: Shows hierarchical NTP architecture with primary servers, secondary servers, and client computers
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how distributed systems maintain time consistency
